name: edge-phone-cdp-controller
description: Control an existing Windows Microsoft Edge profile from Android through CDP, with a strict human-operated mode for ChatGPT and Claude, fixed-proxy inheritance, Windows UI Automation tab sync, resilient screen streaming, optional native touch, local-only calibration overlays, history, and computer-file upload.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/geometry.js && node --check lib/geometry.js && node --check lib/input-coordinates.js && node --check lib/computer-files.js && node --check lib/edge-history.js && node --check lib/windows-edge-uia.js && node --check lib/windows-clipboard.js
scripts.test: node test/geometry.test.js && node test/input-coordinates.test.js && node test/protocol.test.js && node test/computer-files.test.js && node test/edge-history.test.js && node test/browser-history-integration.test.js && node test/windows-edge-uia.test.js && node test/idle-sharpen.test.js && node test/windows-clipboard.test.js && node test/ws-auth.test.js && node test/static-dom.test.js && node test/project-integrity.test.js && node test/manual-compatibility.test.js && node test/reconnect-recovery.test.js && node test/desktop-tab-follow.test.js && node test/mock-integration.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:browser && npm run test:real
